hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 430 m from property

snippets.snippet: You can make coffee n tea in the kitchen.

address.address1: Jl. Sri Ratu Syafiatuddin No. 14 E, Komplek Sri Ratu Safiatuddin

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Suitable for just sleeping. The place is comfortable and clean. The downside is that if there are people next door, it's not soundproof.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.originalComment: Cocok untuk yang sekedar tidur doang. Tempatnya nyaman dan bersih. Minusnya kalau disamping ada orang Tidak kedap.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The woman staff was friendly. 
The facilities were excellent.  You can make coffee n tea in the kitchen. 
Just I don't like the honesty ...I booked a room with breakfast which means it's not free breakfast added in the price but when I come they didn't offer breakfast with hundreds alibi. Hey when you offer a room without breakfast then say it no breakfast n no additional cost. 
Better you improve your business than make a lie to the customer. Good I only sleep for a night.

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A clean, quiet, comfortable, safe place 🫰

reviewerInfo.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

comments.originalComment: Tempat yang bersih, tenang, nyaman, aman 🫰
